judgeReasoning: The response satisfies all required rubric points: it explains group organizes navigation, llms.txt sections, search metadata, and AGENTS.md grouping; characterizes /llms-full.txt as the monolithic all-docs flattened fallback that is not sharded per group; and lists many valid optional frontmatter fields (icon, deprecated, experimental, canary, new, draft, tags, full, lastModified, lastAuthor). It includes a couple of fields not in the rubric list (deprecatedReason, availableIn) but the rubric only disqualifies if fewer than two valid fields exist, which is not the case here.
